zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Basset於大約1315年出生在英國時，她的父親Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton11歲，母親Joan Latimer17歲。她於大約1334年與Thomas Aylesbury在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1343年7月14日之前在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Basset于大约1315年出生在英国时，她的父亲Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton11岁，母亲Joan Latimer17岁。她于大约1334年与Thomas Aylesbury在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1343年7月14日之前在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Basset was born about 1315, in England, her father, Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton, was 11 and her mother, Joan Latimer, was 17. She married Thomas Aylesbury about 1334, in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 14 July 1343, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Basset est née environ 1315, à Angleterre, son père, Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Joan Latimer, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Aylesbury environ 1334, à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 14 juillet 1343, dans sa ville natale.

Sie hat um 1334 in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Aylesbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 14. Juli 1343 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Basset è nata il circa 1315 nel England, sua padre, Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton, aveva 11 anni e sua madre, Joan Latimer, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Aylesbury circa 1334, nel Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 14 luglio 1343, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bassetが約1315年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Draytonは11歳，母Joan Latimerは17歳であった。約1334年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスでThomas Aylesburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1343年7月14日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Basset(이)가 대략 1315년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton(은)는 11세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Latimer(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에서 Thomas Aylesbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1343년 7월 14일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Aylesbury aproximadamente 1334, em Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Basset родилась около 1315 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Basset 3rd Lord of Drayton было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Latimer, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Aylesbury около 1334 г. в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 14 июля 1343 г. в её родном городе.
